top_sources.top_snippet: ** ## ⭐ Mechanism — Autophagy Activation ### Primary action: induces autophagy - Autophagy = cellular cleanup process — removes damaged proteins, dysfunctional mitochondria, debris - Most consistently
top_sources.top_context: ** ## ⭐ Mechanism — Autophagy Activation ### Primary action: induces autophagy - Autophagy = cellular cleanup process — removes damaged proteins, dysfunctional mitochondria, debris - Most consistently associated mechanism with **lifespan extension across species** ### How spermidine differs from rapamycin - Rapamycin: direct mTOR inhibition - **Spermidine: independent of mTOR** — works via **EP300 acetyltransferase inhibition** - EP300 promotes protein acetylation → suppresses autophagy - Spermidine inhibits EP300 → deacetylates key autophagy proteins → cleanup machinery turns back on ### Mitop

acute_signals.snippet: Well within studied safety margins - Likely meaningful autophagy signaling without experimental megadosing ### Cycling philosophy - "Not something I would pulse" - View as **consistent background long
